story: The prefix neo is used to describe a 20th-century or contemporary composition written in the style of an earlier era, such as Classical or Romantic. Stravinsky's Pulcinella, for example, is a neoclassical composition because it is stylistically similar to works of the Classical era.
q1: Stravinsky's Pulcinella is classified as neoclassical because it stylistically resembles compositions of the Romantic era. (True/False?)
